utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), additional_services (any enhancement services with costs), and total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the final coverage plan, health_coverage is fully specified with both physical and mental components, detailed plan names, coverage descriptions, monthly and annual costs, and deductibles. Property_coverage is specified with plan name, coverage description, and costs. Travel_coverage is specified with plan name, coverage description, and costs. Additional_services is specified with plan name, benefits, and costs. Total_budget is specified with monthly and annual totals. All items are present and contain the necessary details required by the format.
